description: An official benefit verification letter issued by the Social Security Administration detailing an individual's monthly benefit type and payment amounts.

first_name.instruction: First name of the SSA benefit recipient.

recipient_ssn.instruction: Social Security Number. Reformat as XXX-XX-XXXX.

benefit_type.instruction: Type of SSA benefit (retirement, disability, SSI, survivor).

monthly_gross_amount.instruction: Current monthly gross benefit payment amount before deductions. Necessary to track in the event of overpayment.

effective_date.instruction: Date the current payment amount went into effect. YYYY-MM-DD format.

medicare_deduction.instruction: Medicare premium deducted from benefit if applicable.

letter_date.instruction: Date the SSA letter was issued. YYYY-MM-DD format.
